query:
UPDATE notifications 
                SET 
                    group_count = group_count + 1,
                    updated_at = NOW()
                WHERE deployment_id = $1
                AND user_id = $2
                AND group_id = $3
                AND created_at = (
                    SELECT MAX(created_at) 
                    FROM notifications 
                    WHERE deployment_id = $1 
                    AND user_id = $2 
                    AND group_id = $3
                )
                RETURNING id
